title: Tired
description:
Built for speed. Designed for precision. This is racing stripped down to its core by a solo developer.

In this cyberpunk time trial demo, you’ll take on 18 high-speed tracks with nothing in your way except your own limits, your ghost and a leaderboard to compete in. Just clean, responsive handling and the brutal pursuit of a faster lap trying to beat your own ghost. 

Car customization: unique but simple, give your car a distinctive look and make it your own.

Just you, the track, and the clock.

 
Every second matters. Every mistake sticks. The difference between a smooth run and a reset is often a single input too late. Your biggest enemy? Your own skill.

 

This is about learning the lines, trusting your instincts, and pushing past your plateau. Instant restarts keep the momentum going, and tight controls mean no excuses.
description_short: High-speed cyberpunk time trial racing. Master 18 tracks with tight controls, instant restarts, and no distractions—just you, the clock, and the push to go faster. Your biggest rival is your own skill.
